title: LEFT JOIN with an OR in the ON clause causes segfault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK(age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL), ('Charlie', 25);
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id OR u.age IS NULL;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with OR in ON clause
